title: Clinical Symptoms, Laboratory Parameters and Long-Term Follow-up in a National DADA2 Cohort.
author: Andriessen MVE Legger GE Bredius RGM van Gijn ME Hak AE Muller PCEH Kamphuis S Klouwer FCC Kuijpers TW Leavis HL Nierkens S Rutgers A van der Veken LT van Well GTJ Mulders-Manders CM van Montfrans JM
content: S-EPMC10499949 PMC10499949 Clinical Symptoms, Laboratory Parameters and Long-Term Follow-up in a National DADA2 Cohort. Deficiency of adenosine deaminase-2 (DADA2) is an autosomal recessive autoinflammatory disease with an extremely variable disease presentation. This paper provides a comprehensive
